data.title: Stock Of The Day: Sell Signal In Riot Platforms?

data.title: How Much Did Americans Overspend On Weight Loss Medications in 2024? GoodRx Reveals
data.description: GoodRx's latest research shows surging demand for weight loss medications like Wegovy and Zepbound, despite high costs and limited insurance coverage, with consumers overspending $200 million in 2024.

data.title: What's Going On With NIO Stock Today?
data.description: NIO's stock is trading higher today, driven by key developments including accelerated battery swap station construction, a legal victory over Audi in Australia, and the opening of its first NIO House in the MENA region.
